name: Whiskey-Sour Popcorn Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare approximately 1/2 cup dry whiskey sour mix (2 packets of individual drink mix, 1/2 cup sugar, 1/4 tsp salt, 1/4 cup light corn syrup, 1/2 cup water, 1/4 tsp vinegar).
2. Preheat oven to 250°F.
3. Place popcorn in a large, deep buttered baking pan and keep warm in the oven.
4. Combine other ingredients in a large saucepan.
5. Cook until the mixture reaches 250°F on a candy thermometer.
6. Remove popcorn from the oven.
7. Pour syrup mixture over popcorn and mix well.
